extension.description: Complemento no oficial de Plex para Kodi
extension.disclaimer: This add-on is not supported by Plex
Este add-on no está respaldado por Plex
Dieses Addon wird nicht von der Firma Plex Inc. unterstützt
extension.news: - Core: Concurrency: Check for sys._is_gil_enabled() instead of trying to discern it from the python version - Core/KodiGUI/Busy: busy.dialog: Wait for 1.5 seconds until showing the busy spinner (was: 0.5s) - Core: Detect CE U3k bullds above B9 that implement the alternative LAV filters for future auto-fixing of seamless branching titles - Core: Fix compatibility with Python 3.14 (3.14.2) (might break certain assumptions) (U3k B10) - Core: Future-proof template engine (ibis) (thanks @tuffghost) - Home/LibraryHubs: Use poster view for in progress TV/Movie library hubs (was 16x9 view) - Home/LibraryHubs: Add "Remove from continue watching" option to TV/Movie library's hubs in progress items as well
